name: demo flow and console-script packaging proof
summary: Adds a demo command, human-readable summary report, and verifies the installed bnt console script as the public CLI surface.
user_visible_flows: operator receives normalized outputs, fhir bundle, and a markdown summary report
system_flows: demo command reuses the sample fixture and normalize pipeline
summary markdown is generated from normalization results
installed console script resolves and executes successfully
notes: The critical verification path for this slice is the installed bnt command itself.
